hero.eyebrow: Meetings, decisions, execution — in one workspace
hero.subtitle: SprintifAI turns every meeting into a clear summary, named decisions, and assigned tasks — synced straight to your team's calendar. No more lost action items.
hero.trust: Trusted by product, design, and engineering teams

features.sectionTitle: Five tools your team already uses. One that finally connects them.
features.sectionSubtitle: Stop bouncing between Zoom, Notion, Slack, and Gmail. SprintifAI is the single workspace where meetings end with execution.

meeting.title: Host meetings that record themselves.
meeting.description: HD video, automatic transcripts, instant summaries. Every word, every screen share, every decision — captured without anyone taking notes.

bullets.c: AI summary delivered the moment you hang up

chat.title: Ask anything. Get an answer with sources.
chat.description: Your assistant remembers every meeting, file, and decision. Ask "What did we agree on for the Q3 launch?" and get the exact quote, the timestamp, and who said it.

bullets.b: Draft follow-ups, briefs, and recaps in seconds
bullets.c: Stays inside your workspace — your data, your model

calendar.title: Action items show up where work happens.
calendar.description: When a meeting ends, SprintifAI assigns each task to the right person and drops it onto their calendar — with the original context one click away.

bullets.a: Two-way sync with Google and Microsoft
bullets.b: Smart deadlines based on what was actually said
bullets.c: One-click jump back to the source meeting

files.title: Every artifact, one library.
files.description: Recordings, transcripts, decks, briefs, and follow-ups — organized by meeting, project, and team. Search across all of it from one bar.

bullets.b: Full-text search inside videos and PDFs
bullets.c: Share with a link, expire when you want

gmail.title: Read 3 emails. Skip the other 97.
gmail.description: Every thread gets an AI summary before you open it. Reply in your own voice with drafts that already know the context.

howItWorks.title: From meeting to shipped — in three steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: No new habits to learn. Just hit join.

capture.title: Capture
capture.description: Host or join inside SprintifAI. Transcripts, recordings, and screen shares are saved the moment the meeting starts.

decide.title: Decide
decide.description: When the call ends, AI pulls out the decisions, the action items, the owners, and the deadlines — automatically.

execute.title: Execute
execute.description: Tasks land in the right calendars. Follow-ups are drafted. Nothing falls through the cracks between meetings.

testimonial.quote: We used to spend the first ten minutes of every meeting summarizing the last one. SprintifAI gave us those hours back — and our decisions actually get executed now.
testimonial.author: Priya Raman

finalCta.title: Get the next meeting to ship itself.
finalCta.subtitle: Free to try. No credit card. Five minutes to your first AI-summarized meeting.
